reviews.review_description: good idea but bad realization. look for the free app on sidequest copernic360 and watch the video of the sea and you will really see a 6dof video done right! there are other videos but they are useless but the one of the rocks and the sea is perfect! this app instead features bad videos.

reviews.review_title: How can this possible .. Great idea
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this wonderful walking video.  More please. 
This is very creative and joyful VR app to have.  Love to do more walking from this if possible.   Please continue to add more walking locations because this is what VR can do more than just game.  Thank you
great little experience and future possibilities using this method should be awesome.

reviews.review_title: I LOVE stuff like this, please add more!
reviews.review_description:
Video review (from 3:07): https://youtu.be/CVa_oq_1hp8

Thanks for making this experience, it was amazingly immersive, especially the aquarium! Please add even more moving videos!
